what_changed: Writeback, memory spine, review queue, and profile/council policies are available.
Otto can now create candidates without treating them as durable truth.
why_it_matters: The system can help choose actions instead of only maintaining infrastructure.
Weakness/support framing stays reviewed and non-diagnostic.

active_weakness_or_support_lens.support_hint: Use a small action and a handoff anchor.

smallest_meaningful_next_action.title: Run creative-human heartbeat dry-run
smallest_meaningful_next_action.why_it_matters: Turns Otto from bridge infrastructure into a human-facing continuity system.
smallest_meaningful_next_action.expected_outcome: daily_handoff.json and action_queue.jsonl are generated safely.

support_lens.support: bounded scope plus explicit done signal

what_not_to_do_yet: Do not start Instagram production OAuth.
Do not write unreviewed council/profile statements to Vault.
Do not expand into prediction models before outcome capture exists.
what_needs_review_before_memory: Any weakness statement intended for Vault/QMD
